name: Ansal Housing Limited
summary: Ansal Housing Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development and construction of real estate properties in India. Its project portfolio includes townships, residential and commercial complexes, multistoried buildings, flats, houses, apartments, shopping malls, hotels, and movie halls. The company also operates restaurants under The Great Kabab Factory brand name. The company was formerly known as Ansal Housing & Construction Limited and changed its name to Ansal Housing Limited in December 2018. Ansal Housing Limited was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Ghaziabad, India.
